member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext
member.summary: EF Core database context that hosts Identity and domain entities.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext},EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.ICurrentUserService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext.DomainUsers
member.summary: Gets the users aggregate set.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext.Permissions
member.summary: Gets permissions.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext.RolePermissions
member.summary: Gets permission grants assigned to ASP.NET Core Identity roles.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Authorization.PermissionService
member.summary: EF Core permission resolver that maps Identity users to Identity roles and then to domain permissions.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Authorization.PermissionService.#ctor(EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Configurations.ApplicationUserConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration for the domain user aggregate.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Configurations.PermissionConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration for permissions.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Configurations.RolePermissionConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration for permission grants assigned to ASP.NET Core Identity roles.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Registers persistence services.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.DependencyInjection.AddPersistence(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds EF Core, Identity, repositories, and unit of work.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Identity.IdentityApplicationUser
member.summary: ASP.NET Core Identity user record linked to the domain user aggregate.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Identity.IdentityApplicationUser.DomainUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the linked domain user identifier.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Interceptors.DatabaseExceptionLoggingInterceptor
member.summary: Logs failed Entity Framework database commands so database-side errors are captured in a dedicated log file.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Interceptors.DatabaseExceptionLoggingInterceptor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Interceptors.DatabaseExceptionLoggingInterceptor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: EF Core implementation of the generic repository pattern.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: EF Core unit-of-work implementation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Seed.SeedData
member.summary: Seeds permissions and bootstrap Identity roles used as permission containers.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.Seed.SeedData.SeedAsync(EnterpriseTemplate.Persistence.ApplicationDbContext,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.RoleManager{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.IdentityRole{System.Guid}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies idempotent seed data.
